case_title: IANNOLI, HALLIE LUIA vs. EDGE, LEGEN DEAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IANNOLI, HALLIE LUIA AS TO DEFENDANT EDGE, LEGEN DEAN HART, HARRY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-16-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-26-1996
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-16-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-16-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-16-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS
